message:
feat(tui,robot): expand debug render views and enrich robot recommendation schema

Add history-layout and graph-hittest debug render targets to
render_debug_view(), enabling layout inspection for the history
timeline view and hit-test debugging for the graph view. The history
mode now correctly initializes HistoryViewMode::Bead when rendering
layout debug output.

Extend the robot recommendation JSON schema with new fields:
impact_score, confidence, action, unblocks_ids, blocked_by, assignee,
claim_command, and show_command — making the machine-readable triage
output richer for downstream automation consumers. The "action" field
is now required alongside id, title, and score.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
